Global (All).title: Russia to Sever Economic Ties with UK if 'Unfriendly' Measures Are Imposed
Global (All).summary: UK-Russia relations deteriorate further as Russia threatens to sever economic ties if 'unfriendly' measures are imposed.

Global (All).title: South China Sea: Philippines Objects to China's Construction of Lighthouse in Disputed Waters
Global (All).summary: Tensions continue to rise in the South China Sea as the Philippines objects to China’s construction of a lighthouse in disputed waters.

Global (All).title: Turkey and Sweden Reach 'Historic' Immigration Deal
Global (All).summary: Turkey and Sweden reach a historic immigration deal, but controversy and criticism surround the agreement.

United States.title: Ukraine: U.S. warns Russia may stage false-flag operation in Crimea
United States.summary: United States warns Russia may stage a false-flag operation in Crimea to justify an attack on Ukraine.

United States.title: U.S. and NATO expand military presence in Europe as tensions with Russia escalate
United States.summary: United States and NATO expand military presence in Europe as tensions with Russia escalate.

United States.title: U.S. to provide Ukraine with $400 million in military aid
United States.summary: United States to provide Ukraine with $400 million in military aid.

South Korea.title: North Korea's Missile Test Sparks International Alarm
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired an intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM) into the sea off Japan's coast on July 4, sparking international concern about its military capabilities.

South Korea.title: Protests Erupt in Seoul Over Labor Law Reforms
South Korea.summary: Thousands of protesters gathered in Seoul to demonstrate against the government's proposed labor law reforms, which they claim will weaken workers' rights.

South Korea.title: Cyberattack Hits South Korean Government Websites
South Korea.summary: Several government websites in South Korea were hit by a cyberattack, which experts believe may have originated from a North Korean hacking group.

Japan.summary: The Japan Meteorological Corporation warned of a high risk of heat stroke on Jul 4, 2024.
Typhoon Soulik makes landfall in southern Japan, forcing thousands to evacuate on Jul 9, 2024.
North Korea fires 2 ballistic missiles toward Japan on Jul 7, 2024; warning systems react, but no damage reported.
